use_cases: Rotating showcase for testimonials, reviews, or portfolio items with click-to-cycle interaction
Interactive product feature highlights with smooth spring animations
Visual gallery component for creative portfolios or media collections
Dynamic team member cards that can be reordered on click
E-commerce product carousel with depth and layering effects
ai_summary: Interactive card stack component with stacked visual effect where clicking a card moves it to the bottom of the stack. Features smooth framer-motion spring animations, adjustable offset/scale/dimming for depth perception, and dark/light theme toggle. Cards have dynamic shadow effects based on their position in the stack, creating a polished 3D-like appearance suitable for showcasing rotating content like testimonials, portfolio items, or product highlights.
